src/test/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Activate the 'test' Spring profile for the application context test to ensure correct configuration loading.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.2, which is required for native Java 17 support.
Add Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency for routing capabilities.
Add spring-dotenv dependency to load environment variables from .env files.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java entities.
Add Springfox Boot Starter for Swagger API documentation generation.
Add Springfox Swagger UI dependency to serve the Swagger interface.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin to generate code coverage reports during the build.
Define a production Maven profile with specific properties and build plugins.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to the production profile to build the React frontend.
Add maven-antrun-plugin to the production profile to copy frontend build artifacts to the backend output directory.
Remove Flyway dependency as it is no longer used in this version of the project.

.gitignore.general_idea: Exclude Stryker mutation testing temporary files and reports from version control.
Exclude the built Storybook static directory from version control.
Ignore the root package-lock.json while explicitly allowing the frontend one to prevent accidental commits of the wrong lock file.
Exclude local environment configuration files containing sensitive data from version control.

dev_environment.general_idea: Expose port 6006 in the Docker container to support Storybook development environment.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add Maven resource filtering placeholder for active Spring profiles.
Disable the Open Session in View pattern to prevent lazy loading issues and improve performance.
Configure Google OAuth2 client ID with fallback to environment variables and default value.
Configure Google OAuth2 client secret with fallback to environment variables and default value.
Define the requested scopes for Google OAuth2 authentication.
Expose the mappings endpoint in Spring Boot Actuator for debugging.
Set the base path for Swagger v2 documentation.
Set Hibernate to automatically update the database schema based on entity changes.
Define a custom property for admin emails with fallback to environment variables.
Explicitly set the path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to maintain compatibility with older Spring MVC behavior or specific routing requirements.
